seoTitle: Canton Beach vs Caparra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Canton Beach and Caparra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Canton Beach vs Caparra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Canton Beach and Caparra.
heading: Canton Beach vs Caparra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Canton Beach, New South Wales and Caparra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Canton Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Caparra (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Canton Beach or Caparra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Canton Beach has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Caparra scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Canton Beach scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Caparra scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Canton Beach or Caparra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Canton Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
